definition: structural recurrence = motif recurrence + cyclic transition chains
emergence: FAILS TO EMERGE — historical-narrative semantics cannot be extracted structurally
finding: 'what repeats' structurally = the 13 recurring motif classes and the cyclic transition core. But a model of HISTORY — rise, decline, what drives them — requires semantic valence and narrative that cannot be extracted structurally. The historical model does NOT emerge.
